_publications._publicationTitle: Single-cell multiomics identifies clinically relevant mesenchymal stem-like cells and key regulators for MPNST malignancy.

_contextSnippet: Using the Seurat species integration platform, we visualized human MPNST cells co-embedded with advanced-stage mouse MPNST cells. Despite the species difference, cell types in human MPNST overwhelmingly mapped to the corresponding mouse cell phenotypes
details: Successfully integrated human MPNST cells co-embedded with advanced-stage mouse MPNST cells despite species difference, with cell types overwhelmingly mapping to corresponding mouse cell phenotypes
